title: BEM-866 dispatch error slug
objective:
Run script:
"""
result = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
error = ''
status_value = ''
workflow = ''
if result.exists():
    data = json.loads(result.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    error = str(data.get('error') or '')
    status_value = str(data.get('status') or '')
    workflow = str(data.get('workflow') or data.get('workflow_id') or '')
low = error.lower()
if not result.exists():
    code = 'RESULT_MISSING'
elif not error:
    code = 'ERROR_EMPTY'
elif 'workflow does not have' in low and 'workflow_dispatch' in low:
    code = 'NO_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH'
elif 'not found' in low or '404' in low:
    code = 'WORKFLOW_NOT_FOUND'
elif 'resource not accessible' in low or '403' in low or 'permission' in low:
    code = 'PERMISSION_DENIED'
elif 'unexpected inputs' in low or 'provided: [' in low or 'input' in low:
    code = 'INVALID_INPUTS'
elif 'ref' in low:
    code = 'INVALID_REF'
elif 'disabled' in low:
    code = 'WORKFLOW_DISABLED'
else:
    code = 'UNCLASSIFIED_ERROR'
slug_source = (error or status_value or 'no_error')[:160]
slug = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in slug_source)[:120]
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_DISPATCH_ERROR_' + code + '_' + slug + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 dispatch error slug\nCode: ' + code + '\nStatus: ' + status_value + '\nWorkflow: ' + workflow + '\n\nError:\n' + error + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('dispatch error slug: ' + code)
"""
No issue comments.
